parts.answer: • It is important to keep a realistic perspective and make sure the brand messages raised through PR can be fulfilled and represent the customer’s expectations of the destination and match the brand promise • Other communication methods are equally as effective and may be cost saving compared with employing a PR agency to work on behalf of the guardians of the brand Accept any other reasonable answers. Tasmania to communicate the destination’s brand identity. Award two marks for each explanation of how TT can use each media type to communicate. paid for Will give Tourism Tasmania wider reach, more visibility, enhanced brand awareness and more targeted advertising using above the line marketing media (1) through tv, online videos, cinema, radio, social media and digital ads (1) shared Includes posts to platforms such as Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, Pinterest and Instagram (1) These posts could come from brands, media outlets and individuals. Followers, friends etc. will see the initial post and can like, share or repost using hashtags or tagging (1) Accept any other reasonable answers. October/November Question Answer Marks branding of Tasmania. Use table B to mark candidate responses to this question. AO2 – out of 3 marks AO3 – out of 3 marks AO4 – out of 3 marks AO2 Application • Tourism Tasmania, the NTO, will act as the guardian of the brand and support and fund the RTOs • The 4 regional tourism organisations in Tasmania will act as more localised representatives of the tourism industry • Commercial organisations such as local transport and accommodation providers work with the RTOs to promote the destination brand • All the key stakeholders will work to promote the destination and generate demand through a range of marketing campaigns AO3 Analysis and research • As guardian of the brand, Tourism Tasmania will set the strategic direction for tourism in Tasmania, identify priorities and deliver programmes that engage the industry and its stakeholders • The 4 regio
